Technology

Engineering, IT, Cybersecurity, Data, Cloud, AI

We’re the backbone and the turbo engine behind FanDuel’s rise—and we don’t just build software, we build the future. Step into our world and you’ll find a frontier-style playground where top-tier talent tackles complex challenges head-on.

From crafting innovative tech to scaling a platform that’s fast, secure, and rock-solid, we’re doing it all in one of the most regulated—and exciting—markets out there. Every day brings something new, and we wouldn’t have it any other way.

view All Tech Roles

Corporate Strategy

business strategy, operations, automation

Think of us as FanDuel’s internal special ops team—part strategy, part execution, all impact. We partner with leadership to launch bold new initiatives, untangle complex cross-functional puzzles, and jump in wherever extra brainpower or fresh skills are needed.

Our secret weapon? We get to do all this in the world of sports and gaming—stuff we (and millions of fans) live and breathe every day. It’s work, but it sure doesn’t feel like it.

view All Corporate Strategy Roles

Risk & Trading

sports trading, innovation, Data science

We’re the brains behind the odds—the Risk & Trading team that keeps FanDuel sharp, smart, and always one step ahead. Using cutting-edge models and real-time insights, we price markets with precision and manage risk like pros, all while staying locked into the rules of every jurisdiction we play in.

But we don’t just crunch numbers—we shape strategy. Collaborating across the business, we help power bold moves and smooth experiences that keep our customers coming back for more. Bottom line: if it affects the odds, we’re all over it.

view All Risk & Trading Roles

Product

Product Management, Design, Data, Research

We dream it, design it, and deliver it—we’re the team behind the experiences customers can’t get enough of. From deep-dive research to sleek app features and wow-worthy retail moments, we turn insights into action and ideas into magic.

Packed with talent—Product Managers, Designers, Researchers, Data Scientists, and Analysts—we’re a powerhouse squad that partners with Marketing, Engineering, and Commercial to launch what’s next and level up what’s now. If it delights our customers, we’re all over it.

view All Product Roles

People

Human resources, Talent Acquisition, Early Careers, Talent Development, Inclusion, Compensation

We’re not your typical HR team—we’re the FanDuel People Team, and we bring the vibes. Sure, we handle the essentials like hiring, growth, pay, perks, and inclusion—but that’s just our warm-up act. We’re the crew behind the career-launching programs, can’t-miss events, and culture that keeps FanDuel buzzing.

From day one to day “let’s level up,” we’ve got your back—making sure your experience here is nothing short of legendary. Unparalleled? Check. Unrivaled? Always. Unforgettable? You better believe it.

view All People Roles

External Affairs & Partnerships

Communications, Events, Government Affairs, Responsible Gaming

We’re the market-makers, bridge-builders, and big-picture thinkers. The Partnerships & External Affairs team is all about expanding FanDuel’s world—smartly, sustainably, and with serious swagger. From navigating the halls of government to shaping public perception, we run point on the programs that protect and grow our playing field.

We’re also in the business of bold connections—teaming up with partners and stakeholders to spot the next big opportunity and turn it into game-changing growth. If it helps FanDuel stretch, scale, and shine, we’re already on it.

view All External Affairs & Partnerships Roles

Marketing

Strategy, Creative, Production, Media

If it grabs attention, sparks emotion, or makes fans say “wow”—that’s us. From bold brand moves to scroll-stopping content, performance magic to product promos, we bring FanDuel to life through storytelling that hits hard and sticks. You’ll spot our work everywhere—on your feed, during the big game, and lighting up the jumbotron at your favorite stadium.

We don’t just show up—we show off. Because making every moment more means putting ourselves out there. And let’s be real… we crush it.

view All Marketing Roles

Legal & Compliance

Legal, Compliance, Risk

We’re the powerhouse team behind the rules, the relationships, and the rocket fuel for FanDuel’s growth. From legal advice to lobbying, compliance to cutting-edge partnerships—we cover it all. Our crew of sharp attorneys, savvy policy pros, eagle-eyed analysts, and deal-makers brings serious expertise and even bigger energy.

In a world full of regulations, we keep FanDuel ahead of the game—building smart, sustainable strategies that unlock growth while playing by (and sometimes helping shape) the rules. Whether it’s gaming, sports, media, or tech, we know how to partner up and power forward.

view All Legal & Compliance Roles

Finance & Facilities

Accounting, Finance, Procurement, Workspace

Our Finance team is where strategy meets spark. We don’t just crunch numbers—we power big ideas. With sharp analysis, smart planning, and a healthy respect for risk, we fine-tune business operations to fuel what’s next. Growth? We’re already forecasting it.

Meanwhile, our Facilities team keeps FanDuel running in style. From scouting new spaces to building out sleek, modern offices, we create safe, top-tier environments that match our ambition. As a global crew, we make sure every location—whether home base or a pit stop—is a winning experience for employees on the move.

view All Finance & Facilities Roles

Customer Ops

Customer Support, CX, VIP, Payments & Fraud

We’re the front line, the fixers, and the fan advocates—all rolled into one. Around the clock, we’ve got our fans’ backs—answering questions, solving problems, and turning feedback into fuel for better products. We keep the play going and the good vibes flowing, while making sure our insights shape smarter marketing and sharper product experiences. In a fast-moving industry, we’re here to simplify, streamline, and smooth out the bumps—so fans can spend less time stuck and more time doing what they love: playing.

view All Customer Ops Roles

Commercial

Retail, Operations, Sportsbook

We’re the engine room that keeps FanDuel firing on all cylinders. Our mission? Make sure every project, plan, and play are driving toward a shared goal: serving our customers and hitting the business bullseye. We’re the glue behind the scenes—running fantasy contests, tracking performance, and sniffing out new opportunities like pros. With deep sports and casino know-how, a sharp eye for process upgrades, and commercial instincts to match, we balance today’s wins with tomorrow’s big plays. All while keeping the customer at the heart of the game.

view All Commercial Roles

Broadcast

FanDuel TV

Here, TV isn’t just TV—it’s our 24/7 hype machine. We call it “Transactional TV,” and it’s our secret sauce. Sure, horse racing is the star of the show, but we’re always sneaking in shoutouts to our other verticals during live, nationally aired broadcasts. We mix the thrill of the race with smart promos, playful retention tactics, and ways to help our fans win bigger and better. The result? We’re not just in the race—we’re leading the pack in betting.

view All Broadcast Roles
